headline: JFrog report finds AI growth driving new software supply chain threats
summary: A new report from JFrog Ltd. reveals that the expansion of AI technology is significantly increasing security threats across the software supply chain, coinciding with a rise in malicious AI models and vulnerabilities. Additionally, the proliferation of security tools is contributing to complexity, suggesting a need for more streamlined approaches to protection.

The report also noted that while AI use by threat actors was limited in 2024, it is expected to increase in 2025 across various attack phases and potentially target AI systems themselves.
